title: 3 Facts About Lightning

segments.text: A single bolt of lightning is five times hotter than the surface of the Sun.
And it is even stranger than it looks.
Lightning strikes the Earth around eight million times every single day.
It can strike the same spot many times. One skyscraper gets hit about twenty times a year.
And in one place in Venezuela, lightning storms happen almost every night.
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: Lightning is 5x hotter than the Sun and hits Earth 8 million times a day. Follow for daily facts!
